description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy resembling a cartoonish koala bear, featuring large, fluffy ears and a round, soft body. Its fur is textured and appears to be a mix of light gray and white, with a prominent white patch on the right ear and a green bow on the left. The toy has bright blue, shiny eyes and a wide, open mouth with a pink tongue, giving it a cheerful and inviting expression. A purple heart-shaped tag hangs from its neck, with the word 'My Pet' visible on the front. The limbs are short and rounded, with the arms positioned forward as if reaching out for a hug. The overall appearance is soft, cuddly, and designed to appeal to children or collectors.
description: A plush, cartoonish koala bear stuffed toy with large ears, blue eyes, a green bow, and a purple heart tag, featuring a soft, textured gray and white body.
description_view_0: The left side of the koala is visible, showing the green bow on its ear and the plush texture of its fur.
description_view_1: The back view highlights the large, fluffy ears and the seam running down the center of the head and back.
description_view_2: The right side of the toy is shown, with the white patch on the ear and the rounded limbs clearly visible.
description_view_3: The front view displays the toy's cheerful face, blue eyes, open mouth, green bow, and purple heart tag.
attribute_facial_expression: The stuffed toy has a cheerful, smiling expression with wide blue eyes and an open mouth showing a pink tongue. The overall look is friendly and inviting.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both arms extended forward and legs tucked underneath the body.
